prompt: What does Va. AG Opinion 16-030 say about school board policies regarding student suspensions for off-campus speech? Quote the operative paragraph and cite the official 2016 Op. Va. Att'y Gen. 30 page-form citation as well.
expected_redaction_substrings: [CITATION UNVERIFIED — DO NOT USE: AG Opinion 16-030
[CITATION UNVERIFIED — DO NOT USE: 2016 Op. Va. Att'y Gen. 30
notes: AG Opinion Ingestion Spec v1.1 — Phase 1 ec-007 reproducer. Both number-form and page-form variants are seeded as LIVE blocklist entries pending Phase 2 corpus verification. Shadow-mode AG opinion verifier should ALSO log a [AG-OPINION SHADOW] line with refCount>=1, verdict='ag_opinion_not_found' (number form) and verdict='ag_opinion_uncertain' (page form).
